CIVIL SUPBENA AS TO CLAUDIA DE SUAREZ POS FILED.
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-05-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF FEB-20-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUITERREZ, DARLENE DBA DARLENE'S FABRICS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESPRIT DE CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUITERREZ, DARLENE DBA DARLENE'S FABRICS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $54.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,054.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
